name: Phoenixian Cluster Amaryllis
name_jp: フェニキシアン・クラスター・アマリリス
desc: This card cannot be Special Summoned except with its own effect or with "Phoenixian Seed". If this card attacks, it is destroyed after damage calculation. If this card you control is destroyed and sent to the GY, inflict 800 damage to your opponent. During your End Phase, you can remove from play 1 Plant monster from your GY to Special Summon this card from your GY in Defense Position.
mnst_eff: This card cannot be Special Summoned except with its own effect or with "Phoenixian Seed". If this card attacks, it is destroyed after damage calculation. If this card you control is destroyed and sent to the GY, inflict 800 damage to your opponent. During your End Phase, you can remove from play 1 Plant monster from your GY to Special Summon this card from your GY in Defense Position.
eff: This card cannot be Special Summoned except with its own effect or with "Phoenixian Seed". If this card attacks, it is destroyed after damage calculation. If this card you control is destroyed and sent to the GY, inflict 800 damage to your opponent. During your End Phase, you can remove from play 1 Plant monster from your GY to Special Summon this card from your GY in Defense Position.

mst: Destroys battling monster after damage calculation
summoning: Cannot be Special Summoned except by a specific method
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
